$comment: The Office — Mission Control. Design tokens. Theme is driven by CSS custom properties set on a single root element; everything else reads var(--token). accentSoft = accent at the given alpha; accentLine = accent at the given alpha (used for pulsing-dot rings).

fonts.notes: Mono is used for ALL labels (uppercase, letter-spacing .1–.18em), numeric metrics, IDs, @handles, timestamps and log lines. Sans for everything else.

semantic.$comment: Status / meaning colors. Same role in both themes; values differ for contrast.

accent.$comment: Brand accent. User-selectable. Only affects: active nav, primary buttons, brand logo, highlights, live-tick dots. Does NOT replace semantic colors.

agentColors.$comment: Per-agent identity color used for monogram coins, kanban left-borders, memory/message author chips, usage bars. Configurable per agent.

statusColorMap.$comment: Maps agent runtime status -> semantic color + whether the status dot pulses.

elevation.$comment: No drop shadows in the base design. Separation comes from surface vs bg + 1px borders. Running agent card in Variation B uses a subtle accent ring; not required for A.

motion.pulseDot: @keyframes pulseDot { 0% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 var(--dc); } 70% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 7px transparent; } 100% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 transparent; } }  — applied as: animation: pulseDot 1.6s ease-out infinite; with --dc set to the dot color at ~0.55 alpha
motion.blink: @keyframes blink { 0%,100% { opacity: 1 } 50% { opacity: .35 } } — log cursor, 1.1s steps(1) infinite
motion.tickInterval: 1000ms — updates live clock, running-agent elapsed timer, and running-agent token counter
